# Airclap

> Free cross-platform file transfer tool for Mac, iOS, Windows, and Android devices over local network. No internet required, no file size limits, ultra-fast LAN transfers.

## Product Info
- [Homepage](https://airclap.app): Product overview and download links
- [AirDrop Alternative](https://airclap.app/alternatives/airdrop.html): Why Airclap is the best AirDrop alternative for Windows and Android
- [Airclap vs LocalSend](https://airclap.app/vs/localsend.html): Honest feature-by-feature comparison
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/airclap/id6467128147): iOS and macOS versions
- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=tech.gentleflow.airclap.pro): Android version
- [Microsoft Store](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9n19c4qdkr6d): Windows version
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Gentleflow/Airclap): Source code and releases

## Key Features
- Cross-platform file transfer (macOS, iOS, Windows, Android, Apple Vision Pro)
- LAN-based transfers — no internet connection needed
- 200% faster than similar tools
- Drag and drop interface with zero-config auto-discovery
- No file size limits (Pro)
- Text content sharing support
- Multiple file format support with clear previews
- Private by design — no cloud, no server, no data collection

## Pricing
- Free: Basic file transfer, 20 files max, 100MB per file
- Pro: Unlimited files and size, batch transfer, folder transfer, transfer history
- Monthly $0.99 / Annual $9.99 / Lifetime $19.99

## Community & Recognition
- [Product Hunt](https://www.producthunt.com/products/airclap): #1 Product of the Day — 533 upvotes, 227 comments
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lianglu6037): Demo videos and tutorials
- [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/airclap_app): Updates and announcements
- App Store: 5.0 rating
- Active in 120+ countries, 44 languages supported
